description: A Marketing Manager needs a dedicated landing page to drive pre-orders for a new photography book. Assemble the campaign assets from ~/Campaign_Assets/ into a published WordPress page titled "Urban Photography Book Launch". The page must feature a cover section using hero-bg.jpg with the heading "The Art of Urban Photography", the intro text from copy.txt, the embedded video from video_link.txt, and a three-column layout containing the "Tier 1", "Tier 2", and "Tier 3" details. Include a "Pre-order Now" button at the bottom linking to /checkout/. Ensure the page is constructed using the appropriate Gutenberg blocks (Cover, Embed, Columns, and Button) as the verification system checks the underlying block markup.
